pi_items.source: task.json metadata field; confirmed in setup_task.sh line 7 (virtualmin_domain_exists check) and task description
task.json metadata field; confirmed in task description as 'Set the administration password for the virtual server to NewClient456!'

task.json metadata field; verified against Virtualmin create-domain CLI API documentation (https://www.virtualmin.com/docs/development/api-programs/create-domain/). Features map to: --web (website hosting), --dns (DNS domain), --mail (email services), --mysql (MySQL/MariaDB database)
task.json description; verified against Virtualmin documentation (https://www.virtualmin.com/docs/getting-started/how-to-log-in-to-virtualmin/) confirming port 10000 as default HTTPS access port
task.json description and confirmed in task_utils.sh line 8 (VIRTUALMIN_USER='root') and install_virtualmin.sh line 27 (root password setup)
task.json description and confirmed in task_utils.sh line 9 (VIRTUALMIN_PASS='GymAnything123!') and setup_virtualmin.sh line 27 (root password setup)

task.json description mentions 'web hosting (Apache)'; verified against Virtualmin LAMP bundle documentation (https://www.digitalocean.com/community/tutorials/how-to-install-virtualmin-with-webmin-lamp-bind-and-postfix-on-ubuntu-16-04) and install_virtualmin.sh line 82 (--bundle LAMP includes Apache)

task.json description mentions 'email (Postfix/Dovecot)'; verified against Virtualmin documentation (https://www.virtualmin.com/docs/server-components/troubleshooting-emails/) and web search results confirming Postfix is default SMTP for Virtualmin LAMP bundle

task.json description mentions 'email (Postfix/Dovecot)'; verified against Virtualmin documentation and web search results (https://www.digitalocean.com/community/tutorials/how-to-install-virtualmin-with-webmin-lamp-bind-and-postfix-on-ubuntu-16-04) confirming Dovecot for IMAP/POP3

task.json description mentions 'DNS (BIND)'; verified against Virtualmin documentation and web search results (https://www.digitalocean.com/community/tutorials/how-to-install-virtualmin-with-webmin-lamp-bind-and-postfix-on-ubuntu-16-04) confirming BIND is default DNS for Virtualmin LAMP bundle
task.json description mentions 'MySQL database'; verified in setup_virtualmin.sh lines 157-178 confirming MariaDB (MySQL compatible) configuration. Virtualmin LAMP bundle includes MySQL/MariaDB

privileged_info_summary: The task is to create a new virtual server with domain name 'newclient.test' in Virtualmin control panel (accessible at https://localhost:10000 with login root/GymAnything123!). The server should enable four features: web hosting (Apache), email (Postfix/Dovecot), DNS (BIND), and MySQL database. The virtual server administrator password should be set to 'NewClient456!'. All required features and software components are standard components of the Virtualmin LAMP bundle. The domain and password values are task-specific synthetic data points.
